_comment: Per-device-class soft performance baselines for nmtcpp integration tests. Any run that violates a threshold is logged as a WARN in the test output / GitHub Step Summary but does NOT fail CI. Populate real numbers after one week of passing data (see QVAC-17790 plan, Phase 4.2). Sentinel/empty is intentional for the first merge.

_schema.buckets: array of { name, platform, execution_provider, thresholds }
_schema.thresholds.tps_min: warn if metrics.tps falls below this value
_schema.thresholds.total_time_ms_max: warn if metrics.total_time_ms exceeds this value

buckets.name: android-arm64-opencl
buckets._comment: Reachable only when caller opts into OpenCL via config.gpu_backend='opencl' on a build with QVAC_NMTCPP_USE_OPENCL defined; default Android backend is Vulkan since QVAC-17790.
